title: Rose22/openlumara
summary: OpenLumara 是一个从头开始编写的 AI 代理框架，专注于精简功能，优化令牌计数，降低安全风险。其模块化设计允许用户仅启用所需的功能，适用于需要高性能和低安全风险的 AI 应用。，基于模型推理的架构
description: AI agent framework, written from scratch (not based on openclaw), focused on stripping it down to the bare necessities, optimizing token count, reducing security risks. modular so you can enable only exactly what you need.
